# brevo_list (Data Source)

Look up a contact list in Brevo by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier of the list.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp of the list.
- `dynamic_list` (Boolean) Whether the list is dynamic.
- `folder_id` (Number) ID of the folder containing the list.
- `name` (String) Name of the list.
- `total_blacklisted` (Number) Number of blacklisted contacts in the list.
- `total_subscribers` (Number) Number of contacts in the list.
- `unique_subscribers` (Number) Number of unique contacts in the list.
